_doc: Declarative OVERLAY for the experience-audit organ (scripts/experience-audit.py) — the sibling of link-surfaces.json, one rung past 'the link resolves' into 'the page is a good experience'. This file holds ONLY budgets, per-surface default overrides, and skips. It NEVER lists URLs: the surface set is DERIVED from the corpus links registry ($LIMEN_CORPVS_ROOT/links-registry.json, every deployment/page/custom-domain link deduped by normalized URL), so a surface is added by publishing a link, not by editing this file (garbage-in guard). Override the overlay path with LIMEN_EXPERIENCE_SURFACES. This file PUBLISHES — never put a private URL, token, or secret here. `defaults` sets the estate-wide budget; `surfaces[<id>]` overrides a single surface's ttfb_ms/max_kb/max_requests and may pin expected_title; `skip[<id>]` drops a surface. Each id is the slugified registry label (run `python3 scripts/experience-audit.py --sweep` to see the derived ids).
_skip_doc: SCOPE: DECORVM's experience judge covers Anthony's PUBLIC PRODUCT FACES — the surfaces a stranger reaches and judges him by. The `skip` entries are three classes, all 'the estate's long tail / stale data is not an egg-face' (decorum-surfaces.yaml verdict note), NOT active embarrassments: (1) org-account STRUCTURE roots (the 7 pillar orgs + meta) — not product URLs a visitor is sent to; (2) a dead unowned domain (padavano.vercel); (3) a DEAD REGISTRY DUPLICATE (4444j99 micro-tato — a retired account's 404'd Pages; the live game runs elsewhere). Every real, live product/value face stays fully judged (portfolio, public-process, public-record-data-scrapper, a-mavs-olevm, …). A skip is auditable and reversible: publish/register real content and remove its line to re-enter judgment.

skip.meta-organvm-meta-organvm-github-io: org-meta account root (cross-organ META tier) — org structure, not a promoted public product face; serves an empty ~5kb root.
skip.organvm-ii-poiesis-organvm-ii-poiesis-gi: pillar-org account landing (POIESIS) — the 7-pillar org taxonomy, not a product URL a visitor is sent to; empty ~5kb root.
skip.organvm-iii-ergon-organvm-iii-ergon-gith: pillar-org account landing (ERGON) — org structure, not a promoted product face; empty ~5kb root.
skip.organvm-iv-taxis-organvm-iv-taxis-github: pillar-org account landing (TAXIS) — org structure, not a promoted product face; empty ~5kb root.
skip.organvm-v-logos-organvm-v-logos-github-i: pillar-org account landing (LOGOS) — org structure, not a promoted product face; empty ~5kb root.
skip.organvm-vi-koinonia-organvm-vi-koinonia-: pillar-org account landing (KOINONIA) — org structure, not a promoted product face; empty ~5kb root.
skip.organvm-vii-kerygma-organvm-vii-kerygma-: pillar-org account landing (KERYGMA) — org structure, not a promoted product face; empty ~5kb root.
skip.padavano-vercel-app: dead, unowned custom domain (0-byte response) — not a live public face; source-registry hygiene follow-up to drop the stale link.
skip.4444j99-micro-tato-play: dead duplicate — 4444j99.github.io/micro-tato-play returns 404 'Site not found' (the 4444J99 account's Pages was retired); the live game runs at organvm.github.io/micro-tato-play (clean, self-contained). Skipping the dead registry artifact; follow-up: register organvm/micro-tato's live Pages URL so the value repo is judged at its working surface.
